title: Melodie

'''Melodies''' were a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Water/Legends|water]]-based [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]]. The species lived deep within the purple mountains of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], most notably [[Sistra Mountain]].

==Biology and appearance==
Melodies were hatched from eggs and started life on land. These young Melodies would live around the underground freshwater lakes deep within the caverns and inlets of the moon's equatorial mountain ranges until they reached the age of 20, when they were to complete the change into an adult Melodie (also known as an [[Elder (Melodie)|Elder]]) in an event called the [[Changing Ceremony]].<ref name="JJK:LW">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]''</ref>

Prior to this, young Melodies who had not yet changed would care for the infant Melodies. This involved gathering [[trico]] which was then made into a paste to feed the infant Melodies until they were old enough to eat the silver-backed fish that lived in the pools within the mountain. Young Melodies lived a dangerous life since they were often preyed upon by numerous predators, including the bird-like [[avril]]s, the rodent-like [[Raith (rodent)|raiths]], the serpentine [[reel]]s, and the spidery [[purella]]s.<ref name="JJK:LW" />

During the Changing Ceremony, these Melodies (also known as [[Changeling (Melodie)|Changelings]]) would be taken down a shallow cove to begin their transformation from land-dweller to water-breather. This shallow cove was the only safe place the Ceremony could take place. It was covered in a blue-green algae which created oxygen through [[Wikipedia:photosynthesis|photosynthesis]] for the Changelings to breathe.<ref name="JJK:LW" />

This process could take weeks, making the Changelings vulnerable to attacks from Yavin 8's predators. Thus, they were guarded by their fellow Melodies who had not changed. During the ceremony, a Changeling's legs would grow together into a single finned tail, and they would also grow gills for breathing underwater. When this change had completed, making them Elders, the Melodie would retreat to deep underground lakes within the mountains where they would live in for the rest of their adult lives. Elders were able to surface for limited amounts of time, which they use to communicate with their young. However, this did not apply to the oldest Melodies, who were not able to surface at all.<ref name="JJK:LW" />

==History==
The Melodies originated on the arid, tundra [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of Yavin 8, one of the gas giant [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin's]] three habitable moons with the others being [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] and [[Yavin 13/Legends|Yavin 13]]. They were an amphibious species that lived in the rivers and lakes of the moon's purple mountains.<ref name="JJK:LW" /><ref name="TEGTPAM">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> Certain [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologists]] in later years suspected that the Melodies as well as the native predators on their homeworld may have been products of [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]].<ref name="GORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

[[File:Melodie-AE.png|thumb|left|250px|A group of Melodie.]]

In [[3997 BBY]], during the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun's]] reign over the [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] of Yavin 4, he imprisoned their children in a spherical [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] device known as the [[Golden Globe]], for the purpose of both controlling the Massassi and to drain the life energies of its trapped captives. The desperate Massassi parents came to Yavin 8 to seek help and met the children of the Melodies. The children took them to their Elders, but they could offer no help since they were unable to leave the waters.<ref name="JJK:LW" />

Thus, the Massassi engraved messages in the rocks and caves of Yavin 8 hoping so that somebody would read them some day and come to their aid. However, these messages were written in the [[Massassi (language)|Massassi tongue]], which made it difficult for non-speakers to understand the text. Worse, the Massassi were wiped out in [[3996 BBY]] during the [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|Jedi/Republic]] assault on the jungle moon. This piece of history would only be preserved in the form of legends by storytellers known as "[[Keeper of Legends]]."<ref name="JJK:LW" />

Millennia later, sometime in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Suz Tanwa]] discovered the species during a trip in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]], but did not reveal their existence to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], fearing that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] would enslave them.<ref name="Y:TBRO">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040722yavin1|series=Yavin: The Big Red One|text=Part 1: Giant}}</ref> In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]] on Yavin 4 discovered the Melodies and also allowed a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] member of the species named [[Lyric]] to study at the Praxeum. Her parents allowed her to go because of the dangerous conditions of their homeworld. Later, when Lyric returned to Yavin 8 to undergo the Changing Ceremony on that same, Jedi trainees [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] escorted Lyric to her homeworld to undergo the Changing Ceremony. During their trip, they fell under attack by native carnivores including an avril, a reel, a purella, and a number of raiths, though they managed to fight them off.<ref name="JJK:LW" />

It was also from the Keeper of Legends [[Aragon]] that Anakin and Tahiri learned about the existence of the ancient Massassi carvings. They discovered these carvings in a cave. During their trip on Yavin 8, Anakin and Tahiri also met [[Sannah]], whom they discovered to be Force-sensitive and took her with them during their home trip to Yavin 4. Later, Sannah assisted them in translating the ancient Massassi carvings.<ref name="JJK:LW" /> They then learned of the origins of the Golden Globe and how to defeat it.<ref name="JJK:P">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Promises]]''</ref>

Shortly after the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Invasion of Yavin 4|captured]] the Jedi Praxeum, the Yuuzhan Vong presumably took the moon. The extragalactic invaders also unleashed deadly Jedi-hunting [[voxyn]] on the moon. Among their victims were Lyric.<ref name="SBS">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref> The fate of the species following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] is currently unknown, although Sannah was present at the [[Conclave on Zonama Sekot]] in [[30 ABY/Legends|30 ABY]].<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>
